historical_period_text: Unless mentioned otherwise, all information is requested for fiscal years 2022, 2023, 2024, and YTD Jan-26, plus the corresponding YTD Jan-25 period.

items.request_text: Budget & Forecast - Please provide the current year budget and next year forecast in as granular a level as prepared.
Detailed Cashflow worksheet or Statement of Cash Flows - Please provide detailed cash flow worksheets or statements of cash flow on a monthly basis.
Regulatory Assets and Liabilities - Please provide schedules, workbook support, and ratemaking treatment for each regulatory asset and liability.
Monthly Revenue and Volume by Rate Class - Please provide monthly revenue and volume by rate class over the historical period.
